tool.name: Import Cookies TikTok
tool.description: Import Netscape cookie file ke browser tab TikTok untuk bypass login. Membaca file cookie dari workspace/cookies/ lalu inject via import_cookies action.

parameters.name: cookie_file
parameters.description: Path ke file cookie di workspace (e.g. cookies/tiktok.txt)

steps.description: Cek file cookie yang tersedia di workspace
Baca isi file cookie Netscape format

steps.label: tiktok
steps.description: Buka TikTok di browser tab baru
Import cookies dari file Netscape ke browser tab
Refresh ke For You page untuk verify login

tool.meta_title: Import Cookies TikTok — Flowork AI Tool
tool.meta_description: Import Netscape cookie file ke browser tab TikTok untuk bypass login. Membaca file cookie dari workspace/cookies/ lalu inject via import_cookies action.
